untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of geometric patterns (two peaks at same level, valley between them, price rounding). Backtest engine lacks pattern recognition indicators. Peak/valley detection, relative price level comparison, and formation geometry cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, etc.). Additionally, 'Measured Move Up Formation' is a pattern-derived target computation method not available in allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using volume surge (signature of late formation phase) and price rejection (failure to push above double top level) as proxies, but this does NOT capture the essential double top pattern geometry. The 72% success rate and 19% average decline are documented but cannot be validated without proper pattern detection. Manual chart-based backtesting or a pattern recognition module is required for accurate BULKOWSKI_DRY_0 implementation.
